source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Each of the children Ali, Lea, Josef, Vittorio and Sophie get a birthday cake. The number on top of the cake shows how old the child is. Lea is two years older than Josef, but one year younger than Ali. Vittorio is the youngest. Which cake belongs to Sophie?
<image1>

answer is a label and cannot be resolved to richer option text

options field only contains option labels without option text

image_dependency: requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the image is necessary rather than optional
The question asks 'Which cake belongs to Sophie?', which requires identifying cakes from the image rather than from text alone
The textual clues only describe age relations; the cake numbers/visual assignments must be read from the image
multi_step: The problem involves multiple relational constraints: Lea is two years older than Josef, one year younger than Ali, and Vittorio is the youngest
Solving requires combining text-based age relations with image-based cake numbers to assign children to cakes
The target is indirect: Sophie is identified after determining the others, which adds an elimination step
verifiability: answer_present=true and answer_type=choice provide a clear final answer format
registry_passed=true and the image asset exists, so the underlying evidence can be checked
Verifiability is reduced because the answer is only a label and the options field does not contain richer option text

decision_reasons: 题干、主图像和答案资产均存在，核心语义可恢复，不应过早 reject
该题图像依赖高且具有一定多步推理价值，具备进入候选池的潜力
但答案仅为选项标签，且缺少可解析的选项文本，降低了答案可验证性与可用性
存在明确资产风险，适合保留并后续补充处理，而非直接作为高优先级样本
